scope_completed: This metadata-only handoff reissue covers the reviewed source range `7b1bcaa8..2a1d2267`, which hardens run-flow terminal snapshot canonicalization, terminal validation, retrieval provenance, and patch/export alignment in `src/qual/engine/run_pipeline.py`, `src/qual/engine/tools/retrieval_tools.py`, `tests/unit/test_engine_run_pipeline.py`, and `tests/unit/test_packet_planner.py`; this commit does not modify `src/qual/engine/**`.
scope_goal: This commit is a metadata-only handoff reissue for the reviewed source range `7b1bcaa8..2a1d2267`; it only synchronizes handoff metadata and does not change `src/qual/engine/**` or the feature implementation.
approved_exception_note: The companion shared packet carries the approved shared/integrator-locked maintenance artifacts (`.codex/kickoff_packets/feat-engine-runs.shared.md`, `.codex/lane_meta/feat-engine-runs.json`, and `THREAD_PACKET.md`) so the lane packet can stay lane-only while still describing the reviewed source range accurately.
tasks_completed: Named the reviewed engine-run source range `7b1bcaa8..2a1d2267` instead of treating the packet files as the feature itself.

Recorded the concrete engine-run files from the reviewed source range as evidence only, not as files changed by this metadata-only commit: `src/qual/engine/run_pipeline.py`, `src/qual/engine/tools/retrieval_tools.py`, `tests/unit/test_engine_run_pipeline.py`, and `tests/unit/test_packet_planner.py`.
Tightened the scope to terminal snapshot canonicalization, terminal validation, retrieval provenance, and patch/export alignment.
Mapped the handoff to `Milestone 4: Retrieval Layer (Planned)` and `Milestone 3: Product Readiness (Planned)`, plus `Retrieval-first context handling` and `Auditable generation`.

Kept the lane, shared, lane-meta, and thread packets synchronized with the reviewed source range while keeping the lane packet lane-only and the shared packet responsible for the shared/integrator-locked maintenance artifacts.
